title: lunaria ovalis
intro: Lunaria ovalis, also known as the honesty or money plant, is a biennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lunaria ovalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that Lunaria ovalis should be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential interactions with other medications.
